voice_observations.caption_text:
Come Together with @curatedbyramahattab and @mohanadalhattab
Stylish, funny and always in sync. The brother-sister duo speak to Level Shoes about creativity, quality time and the magic that happens when their worlds intertwine. ✨
voice_observations.voiceover_text: That's a vibe I'm gonna have in three quarters. I'm Mohannad. I'm a content creator and comedian. I'm Rama and I'm a fashion stylist. If I had to describe Mohannad in three words, funny, annoying, and generous. I would say stylish, driven, and helpful. Coming together means quality time and we make sure to have it on a regular basis. Our worlds are definitely Intertwined. Yeah. And intertwining and we're just talking about how when people come together, they just create magic. What inspires me about Mohannad is his creativity. It's just amazing to have him as a brother with the way his brain functions. She lives unapologetically herself and yeah, I'm an over thinker and she's like, just live, you know. If I were a shoe, I would definitely be a mule. I like pretty things that are comfy at the same time. So I would say a slick shoe. Nice. Yeah. Best friend, support system, my adventure buddy. My best friend, my fashion inspiration, and also a support system. It's very similar what we mean to each other.
